message:
chore(beads): drain 15 ready review beads (cc-pandas triage)

Processes the 15 ready beads surfaced by `bv --robot-triage`:

Closed (12) with rationale notes linking the in-tree implementation:
- pavu  fuzz_format_cross_round_trip  (commit 49f0cdf)
- myra  fuzz_semantic_eq               (commit e142c21)
- s5cj  fuzz_dataframe_eval            (commit 240a620)
- i2j8  groupby resample sum|mean oracle (7c207dd + d78eea6)
- icm3  groupby resample first|last oracle (3eebb3b)
- 28y8  groupby rolling mean|sum oracle  (de68f8b + f7a4e59)
- 339q  groupby rolling min|max|count    (3771fd1 + f7a4e59)
- fmmq  groupby rolling std|var oracle  (2c0cc4c, this branch)
- x4ud  bootstrap_cases evidence ledger (b2ad0cb)
- edjf  agg_name marker cleanup          (superseded by ac1550b/ch4o)
- iy8u  cod co-landed work doctrine     (workflow note accepted)
- arnn  excel_roundtrip helper divergence (LOW, inline doc covers)

Deferred (3) with concrete implementation plans:
- p762  fuzz_pivot_table              (parallel-agent WIP detected)
- aj8a  fuzz_groupby_agg_dispatch     (template + spec in note)
- 6xub  fuzz_rolling_window_with_min_periods (template + spec in note)

Writes use br update --no-db --no-auto-flush --no-auto-import so the
JSONL is the single source of truth; the local SQLite mirror can
resync on demand via `br sync`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
